title: Business unit headcount research
description: Kernel now researches headcount for business units instead of defaulting to zero, surfacing published data where available.

title: Bidirectional custom object push
description: CRM push now supports both relationship directions for custom objects, covering more Salesforce data models.

title: Break cyclic parent/child relationships
description: A new automated agent detects and resolves cyclic parent/child hierarchies using AI to determine the correct direction.

title: Salesforce connection health monitoring
description: Automated checks every 10 minutes detect broken Salesforce connections, with one-click re-authentication emails to clients.

title: Risk score dynamic dates and date pickers
description: Date fields in risk scoring now support relative ranges like 'last 3 months' and include date pickers for faster configuration.

title: Sandbox to production config copy
description: Copy risk configurations between sandbox and production environments with one click, removing manual re-entry.

title: Merge experience improvements
description: Filter merges by status, clearer loading states, and fixes for display errors that made the screen jumpy.

title: Microsoft Dynamics integration
description: Full feature parity with Salesforce in Microsoft Dynamics: field mapping, CRM sync, mass actions, and enrichment.

title: Create missing parents
description: Kernel identifies parent accounts missing from your CRM and creates them automatically, placing every subsidiary correctly in the hierarchy.

title: Bulk CSV enrichment
description: Upload a CSV of company names and URLs and get back firmographic data, hierarchy context, and KERN IDs without a CRM connection.

title: Bulk enrichment API v2
description: Redesigned bulk enrichment endpoint with streaming responses, better error handling, and support for up to 50k records per batch.

title: Salesforce managed package v3.1
description: Updated Salesforce package with support for custom object mapping, field-level sync controls, and improved error logging.
